summary: Frontend-only verification of Butler AI home overhaul (iteration 2). Verified on Expo SDK 53 web preview at the EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL with 7 onboarding flags seeded in localStorage. All critical home-screen elements render without crash: BUTLER AI SVG wordmark (ButlerWordmark via SvgXml), 4-stat row (VECTORS/SCRIPTS/STATUS/RUNTIME), 'SCAN QR TO PAIR' hero CTA, Quick Send card (3 tiles), Connected PC card (OFFLINE state), Security Protocols 6-cell grid with CANARY pill, Quick Access 4-tile grid, GET STARTED / PAIR YOUR PC card, and QuickButlerBar floating composer with neon speech-bubble frame + robot badge. Bottom tab bar correctly registers all 8 tabs (HOME/SCRIPTS/AI/KB/PC/BUILD/SKINS/CONFIG) via testID tab-{route}. Previously-broken __butlerSwitchTab global is now defined and Quick Access tiles all navigate: quick-access-scripts → /scripts, quick-access-butler → /butler, quick-access-knowledge → /knowledge, quick-access-fileshare → /fileshare (hidden route, still navigable). QuickButlerBar send tap navigates to /butler. hero-scan-qr opens the QR Pair modal (renders 'PAIR PC' header + 'ENABLE CAMERA' button + MANUAL IP / SCAN LAN footer). Quick Send tiles (qsend-clipboard/text/file) when PC unpaired do NOT crash — page remains stable and shows 'PC OFFLINE' / 'Pair your PC' messaging. Onboarding regression: clearing localStorage + reload correctly shows the WELCOME 1/10 modal overlay with the underlying tab bar still mounted (data-testid=tab-nexushome present in DOM). No console errors observed on home load. No SYSTEM FAULT error boundary triggered on any tab. One unverified item: AsyncStorage @butler_prefill_prompt did NOT persist after typing 'Hello Butler' into the quickbar input via Playwright (both page.fill and page.keyboard.type); navigation to /butler still occurred. This may be a React Native Web TextInput / Playwright input-event quirk rather than a product bug — recommend E1 verify manually in a real browser session.

integration_issues.issue: When typing into [data-testid=quickbar-input] and tapping [data-testid=quickbar-send] via Playwright, the @butler_prefill_prompt key is NOT written to localStorage (read-back returns null). Navigation to /butler still works. Could be a React Native Web TextInput onChangeText event-dispatch quirk under Playwright; please verify manually that the Butler chat actually prefills the typed prompt.

action_items: Manually verify that typing into the QuickButlerBar and tapping send actually prefills the prompt in the Butler chat tab (Playwright keyboard.type may not be triggering RN Web TextInput.onChangeText).
critical_code_review_comments: nexushome.tsx is very large (>1600 lines). Strongly recommend splitting per-section components (Hero, ConnectedPC, SecurityGrid, QuickAccess, KB feed, Recent Activity, QR Modal) into /components/home/* to stay under the 700-line guideline.
FuturisticTabBar.tsx correctly defines (global as any).__butlerSwitchTab inside useEffect with proper cleanup on unmount. TAB_ALIASES map covers all friendly names used by Quick Access tiles.
NeonChatFrame.tsx + ButlerWordmark.tsx are pure SVG and render correctly at the mobile widths used (no raster fallback needed).

Iteration 1 noted /app/frontend/app/onboardingExit.ts as a misplaced route file — re-check whether E1 moved it; if still present, it continues to trigger an Expo Router missing-default-export warning.

success_rate.frontend: Home render: PASS (8/8 elements). Quick Access navigation: 4/4 PASS. QR modal open: PASS. Quick Send no-crash when unpaired: 3/3 PASS. 8-tab tab bar registration: 8/8 PASS (no SYSTEM FAULT). Onboarding regression: PASS (modal shows over mounted app). QuickButlerBar send → /butler nav: PASS. QuickButlerBar prefill persistence: UNVERIFIED (likely Playwright/RN Web artifact).

seed_data_creation: Seeded 7 onboarding flags in localStorage to bypass the welcome modal: @butler_onboarding_done_v2, @butler_consent_v2, @butler_terms_accepted_v1, @butler_privacy_accepted_v1, @butler_age_confirmed_v1, @butler_lan_consent_v1, @butler_server_privacy_accepted_v1 — all set to '1'.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Quick Access tiles and __butlerSwitchTab fix verified working. Tab bar exposes data-testid=tab-{routeName} (nexushome/scripts/butler/knowledge/logs/builder/skins/settings). Hero CTA testID=hero-scan-qr. Quick Send testIDs=qsend-clipboard|qsend-text|qsend-file. QuickBar testIDs=quickbar-input, quickbar-send. NOTE: butler tab has a one-time 'BUTLER AI Local AI Behavioral Notice' modal that blocks subsequent tab-bar interaction until 'ENTER BUTLER AI' is tapped — this is expected product behavior, not a bug. Use seed_and_load helper that re-seeds + reloads between independent tests to avoid this modal trap.
rca_of_issue: Original Quick Access dead-tile bug RCA: __butlerSwitchTab was previously referenced by nexushome's goToTab(...) closures but never assigned. The fix in FuturisticTabBar.tsx now sets `(global as any).__butlerSwitchTab = (tab) => navigation.navigate(TAB_ALIASES[tab.toLowerCase()] || tab)` inside a useEffect that depends on `navigation`, with proper cleanup on unmount. The TAB_ALIASES map handles friendly aliases (ai→butler, kb→knowledge, pc→logs, build→builder, config→settings, tools→fileshare) so the Quick Access switch in nexushome's renderer matches. Verified via Playwright that all 4 Quick Access tiles navigate to the expected /scripts, /butler, /knowledge, /fileshare URLs.
